description: A control room operator oversees a fleet of autonomous haul trucks, monitoring for obstacles and managing system exceptions.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the autonomous haulage system dashboard, which shows the location and status of all autonomous trucks.

expected_outcome.value: The operator has full visibility of the autonomous fleet.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alert that an autonomous truck has stopped because its sensors have detected an unknown obstacle on the haul road (e.g., a fallen rock).

expected_outcome.value: The operator is alerted to the exception.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a manned vehicle to remove the obstacle. Once clear, remotely instruct the autonomous truck to resume its mission.

expected_outcome.value: The exception is safely managed, and the autonomous truck resumes its task.
